title: CarbonationInput
description: Normalized input for computing priming sugar amounts and force-carbonation pressure for a finished beer.

target_volumes_co2.description: Target carbonation level in volumes of CO2. Typical: 1.8 (English ale) to 3.0 (German wheat / Belgian).

beer_volume_l.description: Volume of beer being packaged, in liters.

package_temp_c.description: Highest temperature the beer reached during fermentation, in °C. Determines the residual CO2 already dissolved in the beer (Henry's law).

serving_temp_c.description: Keg / serving temperature in °C. Used only for the force-carbonation pressure output. Default 4 °C (typical kegerator).
